raw_consumer_statement:
What happened? 
On XX/XX/XXXX, I received a refund of {$1800.00} to my Amex account, resulting in a negative balance of {$1600.00}. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I requested Amex to refund this balance via a mailed check, and the amount was removed from my account. 

By XX/XX/XXXX, I had not received the check, so I requested Amex to cancel it and instead send the refund via direct deposit to my XXXX XXXX checking account. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, the refund was reprocessed, and I was told I would receive the funds within XXXX business days. However, by XX/XX/XXXX, I had still not received the money. 

After following up on XX/XX/XXXX, I was told the delay was due to holidays, and the latest I should receive the money was XX/XX/XXXX. However, I never received it. 

At the end of XX/XX/XXXX, I contacted Amex again and was informed that, instead of depositing the refund into my checking account as requested, they mailed another check without my consent or any notification. 

To this day, I have not received the check and suspect it was never sent. 

What I Want from Amex : Immediate refund of {$1800.00} via direct deposit to my XXXX XXXX Checking Account. 
Proof of mailing for the check, or confirmation that it was never sent. 
Compensation for financial inconvenience caused by Amexs delays and errors. 
An explanation of why my refund method was changed without my consent. 
Amexs repeated mistakes have disrupted my financial planning, and I need a swift resolution.
